items.name: clawdbot-polymarket-neural
items.description: Clawdbot ML prediction module for Polymarket. Runs a neural network trained on 14,200+ resolved markets to score active markets for YES probability, surfacing positions where model diverges from current price.

items.name: clawdbot-polymarket-hedge
items.description: Clawdbot risk hedging module for Polymarket. Monitors open positions in real time and automatically places proportional offsetting orders when a position breaches configured drawdown or exposure limits.

items.name: clawdbot-polymarket-sentiment
